basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has published the Research Assistant Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. NITW/HSS/ICSSR-RS26006/2026/01/. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Research Assistant positions. Candidates holding a Postgraduate degree in English, Social Science, or any allied discipline with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply through Email. Applications will be accepted until 07 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application details below.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in English/Social Science or any allied discipline with a minimum of 55% marks
qualification.details: Postgraduate in English/Social Science or any allied discipline with a minimum of 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Warangal Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Warangal Research Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Warangal Research Assistant positions is 07 August 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in English, Social Science, or any allied discipline with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Assistant post announced by the National Institute of Technology Warangal in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Assistant role will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the NIT Warangal Research Assistant recruitment must be submitted via email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the subject line is correctly mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Research Assistant positions in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant positions will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted either online or offline, depending on the institute's discretion.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Research Assistant posts at NIT Warangal is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is NITW/HSS/ICSSR-RS26006/2026/01/.
